title: NZ School Holidays Travel Tips — How to Beat the Crowds and Save Money
meta_desc: Discover how to beat the crowds and save money during NZ school holidays with our expert travel tips and deals
intro: NZ school holidays can be a challenging time to travel, with popular destinations like Rotorua and Queenstown often increasing their prices by up to 30%. However, with some planning and insider knowledge, you can avoid the crowds and save money. In this article, we'll share our top tips for navigating the NZ school holidays travel chaos.

sections.heading: Plan Ahead to Save Money
sections.body: Booking your accommodation and activities well in advance is crucial to avoiding peak prices. For example, a family room at the Novotel Rotorua Lakeside can cost up to $450 per night during school holidays, but booking 6 months in advance can reduce the price to around $320 per night.

sections.heading: Top Tips for Beating the Crowds
list: Visit popular attractions early in the morning or later in the evening to avoid the crowds
Consider visiting destinations during the week instead of on weekends
Look for alternative activities and attractions that are less crowded, such as the Rotorua Redwoods Forest instead of Wai-O-Tapu
Book a guided tour to get insider knowledge and skip the queues

sections.heading: Drive Times and Distances
sections.body: If you're planning a road trip, make sure to check the drive times and distances between your destinations. For example, the drive from Auckland to Rotorua takes around 3 hours, while the drive from Queenstown to Wanaka takes around 1 hour. You can use our NZ Family Travel Budget Calculator to plan your trip and estimate your fuel costs.

sections.heading: Save Money on Accommodation
sections.body: Consider staying in a campervan or holiday park instead of a hotel or motel. For example, a night at the Rotorua Top 10 Holiday Resort can cost around $150, while a campervan rental from Jucy can cost around $100 per day.

sections.heading: Plan Your Itinerary
sections.body: Use our NZ Family Travel Budget Calculator to plan your itinerary and estimate your costs. You can also check out our destinations page for inspiration and ideas on where to go and what to do.

sections.heading: Get the Best Deals
sections.body: Sign up to our newsletter to get the latest deals and discounts on accommodation, activities, and attractions. You can also follow us on social media to stay up-to-date with the latest news and offers.
